pages.title: Datacenter controller
pages.text: This block is a heart of the datacenter. It check if the structure if formed correctly.$(br2)Checkout $(l:logicore:architecture/datacenter)Datacenter$() page for multiblock guide.$(br2)It can also be used to insert $(l:logicore:components/processor_units)Processor$() units into all the $(l:logicore:machines/server_rack)Server Racks$() and $(l:logicore:machines/computer)Computers$() inside of the multiblock.
A machines used for constructing the multiblock.
